documentation.file_docstring: Limits conversation history to the last N user turns (and their associated assistant responses). This reduces token usage for long-running DM sessions.
inline_comments: Extract provider + user ID from a session key and look up dmHistoryLimit. Supports per-DM overrides and provider defaults. For channel/group sessions, uses historyLimit from provider config.
For DM sessions: per-DM override -> dmHistoryLimit.
Accept both "direct" (new) and "dm" (legacy) for backward compat.
For channel/group sessions: use historyLimit from provider config
This prevents context overflow in long-running channel sessions
@deprecated Use getHistoryLimitFromSessionKey instead. Alias for backward compatibility.
